items.title: The Nets increase their payroll by $13 million by trading Nic Claxton for Julius Randle and #28.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
The Nets increase their payroll by $13 million by trading Nic Claxton for Julius Randle and #28.

They have $20.2 million in room remaining and the $9.4 million room mid-level to spend after.

They now have 15 first-round picks through 2033, including two selections tomorrow.

items.title: The Bulls will use $23.1 million of their cap space to acquire Nic Claxton.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
The Bulls will use $23.1 million of their cap space to acquire Nic Claxton.

They go from from $54 million in cap space to $30.9 million in room remaining.

They would still have the $9.4 million room mid-level to use after.

Great business getting him essentially for free.
